what_it_does: Records a channel attachment metadata entry that associates attachment att-345e274f with board item item-615582f7 in the dragnet-development channel.
observations: YAML frontmatter contains id, channel, attachment_type, target, and added timestamp.
target uses a board:// URI scheme pointing to item-615582f7.
The file body after the frontmatter is empty.
standouts: Use of a board:// URI as a cross-entity target reference.
The attachment_type 'board_items' classifies this as a board-item attachment record.
conventions: Uses YAML frontmatter enclosed by triple dashes.
Markdown file used as a structured metadata record rather than prose.
Identifiers use short prefixed UUID-style slugs (att-..., item-...).
Timestamps are ISO 8601 with timezone offset.
concerns: All semantics live in frontmatter; meaning depends on an external schema not shown here.
The board:// URI scheme and its resolution rules are not defined in this file.
notes: A lightweight channel-attachment ledger stub linking an attachment record to a board item.
questions: What operations are valid for attachment_type board_items?
Is board://item-615582f7 expected to resolve within the same project or across projects?
What is the lifecycle of this attachment record if the target board item changes or is deleted?
purpose_vs_actual: The file serves as a typed link/attachment record; its actual content matches that purpose, though the full schema semantics are external.
intention_signals: It is trying to persist a typed relationship between a channel attachment and a board item so the system can locate or list attachments by their board target.
novelty: Use of a board:// URI scheme to target a board item from a channel attachment record.
contribution: Provides a concrete, timestamped attachment-to-board-item link with a typed attachment classification.
summary_for_embedding: A YAML-frontmatter markdown file that records attachment att-345e274f as a board_items attachment targeting board item item-615582f7 in the dragnet-development channel.
intention_for_embedding: To persist a typed channel-attachment reference from an attachment record to a specific board item.
